case_title: LEONID GLADSHTEYN VS. JP MORGAN CHASE BANK

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $85.00) SERVED APR-20-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-16-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-16-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF LEONID GADSHTEYN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY CHUI LING TAM, BRANCH MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GLADSHTEYN, LEONID RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $130.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,130.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
